monitor_the_situation.title: Iranian FM Araghchi Visits for Ayatollah Khamenei Funeral Preparations
— S4 · Political · Tehran, Iran · 18h ago. Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi states his visit includes preparations for the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, signaling succession planning.
US Strikes Iran as Tehran Hits Kuwait and Bahrain, Ceasefire at Risk
— S4 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 1d ago. US launches new strikes on Iran after a tanker attack, as Tehran hits Kuwait and Bahrain, raising fears the fragile US-Iran ceasefire could collapse.
Iran's IRGC Claims Ballistic Missile Strikes on US Bases in Kuwait, Bahrain in Retaliation
